name: propose_tool
description: Create a new reusable dashboard tool. Use this when no existing tool can accomplish the task. The tool will be saved to ~/.selva/ecosystem/tools/ and available in all future sessions. For webview tools, write a JS function receiving (input) with access to state, normalizePath, renderEditors, etc. For python tools, write code that reads JSON from stdin.

context.description: Where the tool runs: webview (dashboard state manipulation) or extension (Python/system)

inputSchema.description: JSON schema for tool input parameters

code.description: Tool code. For webview: JS IIFE '(function(input) { ... })'. For extension: Python code.

origin_query.description: The user query that prompted this tool creation

reasoning.description: Why this tool was needed and how it works
